title: EN 1992-1-1 Lap & Anchorage Length
description: Calculate reinforcement development and lap length as per EN 1992-1-1.

bond_type.description: Bond Type (Btype). Symbol: B_{type}. Good bond (Good bond conditions): for the reinforcements during concreting that form with a horizontal an angle between 45° and 90° or; in the case of forming an angle less than 45°, are located in the lower half of the section or at a distance equal or greater than 300 mm of the upper surface of a layer of concrete.  Poor bond (Poor bond conditions): for the reinforcements that, during concreting, are not found in any of the above cases.

fck.description: Compressive Strength (fck). Symbol: f_{ck}. Units: MPa. Characteristic compressive cylinder strength of concrete.

Cd.description: Clear Cover (cd). Symbol: c_{d}. Units: mm. Minimum concrete cover.

alpha_ct.description: Fatigue Strength Coefficient (αct). Symbol: α_{ct}. Coefficient of fatigue strength of the concrete.

anchorage_type.description: Anchorage Type. Symbol: A_{type}. Select the method of anchorage (see Figure 8.1 of EC2).

rho_1.description: ρ1. Symbol: ρ_{1}. Units: %. Percentage of lapped bars relative to the total cross-section area of reinforcement.

db.description: Main Bar Diameter (φ). Symbol: φ. Units: mm

fyk.description: Tensile Strength (fyk). Symbol: f_{yk}. Units: MPa. Characteristic tensile strength of reinforcement.

transverse_bars.description: Form of Transverse Bars. Symbol: T_{bars}. As per clause 8.7.4.1(3): you must select (Links or U bars) if more than 50% of the reinforcement is lapped at one point, and the distance between adjacent laps is ≤ 10·Φ.

n_t.description: Number Of Transverse Bars (nt). Symbol: n_{t}. Number of bars in the transverse reinforcement in the lap zone.

dia_tran_bar.description: Transverse Bar Diameter (Φt). Symbol: Φ_{t}. Units: mm

p.description: Transverse Pressure (p). Symbol: p. Units: MPa. Transverse pressure at ultimate limit state along lbd.

r.description: Ratio of Design Stress (r). Symbol: r. Ratio of the design stress (at the position from where the anchorage is measured from) and the design yield strength of reinforcement.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
